title: Sustainability Specialists
description: Address organizational sustainability issues, such as waste stream management, green building practices, and green procurement plans.

tasks.text: Develop sustainability project goals, objectives, initiatives, or strategies in collaboration with other sustainability professionals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor or track sustainability indicators, such as energy usage, natural resource usage, waste generation, and recycling.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assess or propose sustainability initiatives, considering factors such as cost effectiveness, technical feasibility, and acceptance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Provide technical or administrative support for sustainability programs or issues.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review and revise sustainability proposals or policies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop reports or presentations to communicate the effectiveness of sustainability initiatives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create or maintain plans or other documents related to sustainability projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect information about waste stream management or green building practices to inform decision makers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research or review regulatory, technical, or market issues related to sustainability.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Identify or investigate violations of natural resources, waste management, recycling, or other environmental policies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify or create new sustainability indicators.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create marketing or outreach media, such as brochures or Web sites, to communicate sustainability issues, procedures, or objectives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify or procure needed resources to implement sustainability programs or projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write grant applications, rebate applications, or project proposals to secure funding for sustainability projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
